_meta.schema: core.schemas.Estimate (with line_items=list[CostLine] populated from federal bid-schedule CLINs pre-pricing)
_meta.note_on_shape: The 8 line_items below mirror CLINs 0001–0008 from RFP Attachment 2 (Bid Schedule). Quantities are EA / JOB / LF as published in the bid schedule. After the May 27/28 site visit, JOB items decompose into measurable sub-quantities (roof SF, fixture count, heater EA) but the proposal still rolls up to one priced line per CLIN per L.2.1.2.D + M.1.9.
_meta.project_name: San Marcos ARC — Rehabilitate Shop & 2 Stall Garage Building
_meta.owner: U.S. Fish and Wildlife Service (Department of the Interior)
_meta.issuing_office: FWS, Construction A/E Team 1, Falls Church VA
_meta.site_address: 500 East McCarty Lane, San Marcos, TX 78666-1024 (Hays County)
_meta.region_multiplier_note: Hays County / San Marcos / I-35 corridor between San Antonio and Austin typically clears at ~0.94–0.98 of national RSMeans City Cost Index. Carry 1.0 until confirmed with current RSMeans CCI lookup for San Marcos 78666.
_meta.contingency_pct_note: LPTA-thin: reduced from typical 7–10% to 3–5% on the basis that the May 27/28 site visit will resolve the largest quantity uncertainties (roof SF, gutter LF, fixture count). Bump back to 7–8% if the site visit cannot be attended.
_meta.profit_pct_note: LPTA-thin: 5.5% mid-range. Drop to 3–4% if local-market competition is heavy; lift to 7–8% only if a defensible past-performance moat exists.
_meta.dba_labor_burden_uplift_note: Set to 0 until certified-payroll trade rates are compared to firm's labor cost basis. If trade rates exceed firm's labor rates, this number rises.
_meta.assumed_building_footprint_basis: Single-story shop + 2-stall garage with 416 SF interior ceiling-tile area (SOW §1.1.A.3) and likely ~1,500–2,500 SF total footprint. Carry midpoint until measured at site visit. Roof CLIN 0007 is the largest single $-line and the most sensitive to this number.
_meta.fill_instructions: Each CLIN below has quantity matching the federal bid schedule, with sub_quantity_basis describing what to measure on site. Sub quotes for items 0001, 0005, 0006, 0007, 0008 populate unit_cost. For items 0002, 0003, 0004, 0007 the cost_source CSI section gives a partial cost-DB hit — estimator should use sub quotes preferentially. After all items priced, the GRAND TOTAL = sum of (quantity × unit_cost) across all 8 lines, loaded with bonds/GCs/OH/profit per the markup envelope in 06-evaluation-strategy.md §C.

project_name: San Marcos ARC — Rehabilitate Shop & 2 Stall Garage Building

line_items.description: Remove and replace the three overhead sectional doors to include hardware, weather stripping and openers
line_items.sub_quantity_basis: Each door opening: width × height (typical 10' × 10' or 12' × 12' shop doors). Confirm at site visit.
line_items.spec_requirements: 2" insulated panel, white baked polyester finish, 20-ga ext steel / 26-ga back, weather strip, interior-mounted side lock, manual chain-hoist operator (SOW §4.2.B). 3-year door + 10-year finish warranty (SOW §3.4.B.3). Buy American 52.225-9 iron-and-steel < 5% foreign.
line_items.notes: NO COST-DB HIT. Sub quote required. Carry $3,500–$5,500/EA installed allowance pre-quote. Long-lead (4–6 wk procurement) — order day after award.

line_items.description: Remove and replace existing light fixtures with LED light fixtures to meet OSHA requirements
line_items.sub_quantity_basis: Sub-decomposes to fixture EA count. Photograph + count at site visit. Typical shop+garage at 2,000 SF → 8–14 fixtures.
line_items.spec_requirements: Meet OSHA illumination requirements per 29 CFR 1910.305 / 1926 Subpart D. LED industrial vapor-tight or high-bay luminaires sized for shop space. Buy American compliant. Energy Star where category exists.
line_items.notes: Cost-DB hit at $285/EA seed. JOB-level estimate: ~10–14 fixtures × ($285 fixture + ~$150 install) + lamp disposal (universal waste rules) + minor wiring tidy = $5,000–$6,500 LS.

line_items.description: Remove all suspended ceiling grids and tiles
line_items.sub_quantity_basis: 416 SF per SOW §1.1.A.3. Confirm at site visit (typical 2x4 lay-in grid).
line_items.spec_requirements: Demo + disposal. No replacement required. Watch for asbestos in legacy tile (pre-1980 vintage building) — if suspected, stop per H.12.0 and 52.236-2.
line_items.notes: Cost-DB hit at $4.50/SF × 416 SF = $1,872 + minor labor for grid removal + dump fees = $2,000–$3,500 LS.

line_items.description: Remove and replace the existing three (3) exterior personnel doors with insulated hollow metal doors to include frames, hardware, weather stripping and thresh hold
line_items.sub_quantity_basis: 3 EA personnel doors (east side, west side, plus one additional per SOW count). Measure opening W × H + frame depth at site visit.
line_items.spec_requirements: Insulated hollow metal door with HM frame, ANSI Grade 1 hardware, ADA lever, weather strip, threshold. Buy American iron-and-steel < 5% foreign content.
line_items.notes: Cost-DB hit on $950/EA seed for HM door+frame + $425/EA hardware. Insulated premium ~20–40% → $2,000–$2,400/EA installed all-in. 3 × mid = $6,000–$7,200 LS. ⚠️ Quantity-unit discrepancy with RFP p.7 (1 JOB vs Attachment 2 "Qty 3") — see RFI #4 in 03-missing-documents.md.

line_items.description: Terminate, cap and remove existing gas lines from the building
line_items.sub_quantity_basis: Photograph gas-meter location, building penetration, interior pipe routing, total LF of gas pipe + fitting count at site visit.
line_items.spec_requirements: Texas Railroad Commission licensed gas sub. Cap at meter outlet AND at building penetration (verify per RFI #6). Remove interior pipe. Coordinate with local gas LDC (Atmos Energy or co-op) for purge + lockout + permit.
line_items.notes: NO COST-DB HIT. Sub quote required. Carry $1,500–$3,500 LS pre-quote.

line_items.description: Remove and replace existing gutter system to include and replace down spouts
line_items.sub_quantity_basis: RFP estimates 110 LF. Confirm at site visit. Identify downspout locations + lengths (typically 3–5 DS per 100 LF of gutter).
line_items.spec_requirements: 6" K-style or ogee profile (match building scale). Aluminum or galvanized steel — Buy American compliant. Includes downspouts + clips/hangers.
line_items.notes: NO COST-DB HIT for residential / light-comm gutter. Carry $12–$22/LF installed allowance pre-quote. 52.211-18 variation ±15% applies; site-visit measurement should resolve.

line_items.description: Remove and replace existing roof with new roofing sheets
line_items.sub_quantity_basis: Sub-decomposes to roof footprint SF, excluding the south-side lean-to/awning (SOW §1.1.A.7). Working assumption: 2,000 SF. Measure length × width + slope + ridge + eave heights at site visit.
line_items.spec_requirements: 24-gauge metal roof panels matching existing profile (SOW §4.2.A.1). 20-year material warranty (SOW §3.4.B.2). Tear off existing including translucent/transparent panels (SOW §4.1.B.1). Inspect substrate joists per SOW §4.2.A.2; report damage per 52.236-2 if found. Buy American iron-and-steel < 5% foreign.
line_items.notes: Cost-DB hit on $14.50/SF seed for standing seam — verify with actual 24-ga corrugated / R-panel / U-panel pricing ($9–$16/SF installed). At assumed 2,000 SF: $18K–$32K LS. **BIGGEST $-LINE; MEASURE CAREFULLY.**

line_items.description: Remove existing gas fired unit heaters
line_items.sub_quantity_basis: Count + photograph heater units at site visit. Typical shop/garage: 1–3 EA suspended unit heaters.
line_items.spec_requirements: Disconnect (only after gas-line cap per CLIN 0005), unbolt, remove, dispose. Recover refrigerant N/A (gas-fired). No replacement heat — facility is being permanently de-gassed per CLIN 0005.
line_items.notes: NO COST-DB HIT. Sub quote required (typically same gas-licensed sub as CLIN 0005). Per heater $400–$900 removal+dispose; for 1–3 EA: $500–$2,500 LS.

_unsuppressed_summary.note: Subtotal / contingency / overhead / profit / grand_total all currently $0 because every line is at unit_cost=0. Once sub quotes return and site-visit quantities are confirmed, populate unit_cost on each CLIN. The CLIN-level total_cost will be (quantity × unit_cost); the GRAND TOTAL = sum across all 8 CLINs, with markup loaded per the allocation rule in 05-bid-schedule-mapping.md §F.
